frame_analyses.description: Initial setup with needle driver and suture visible. Trainee loading needle onto needle driver.
Trainee beginning to place suture through first mark on Penrose drain. Needle positioned at drainage mark.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Steady approach to first suture placement

frame_analyses.description: Continuing suture placement through drain tissue. Both ends of suture visible through the slit drain.
Completing second suture placement through second mark. Suture now passes through both marked locations.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Suture appears well positioned through both marks

frame_analyses.description: Beginning first throw of surgeon's knot. Creating initial double throw with right hand manipulation.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Appropriate technique for surgeon's knot initiation

frame_analyses.description: Completing surgeon's knot double throw. Knot formation appears secure with good tension.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good double throw execution, maintaining proper tension

frame_analyses.description: Starting second throw with hand switch. Switching from right to left hand for opposite direction throw.
Executing third and final throw. Another hand switch performed for alternating throw direction.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good alternating technique with proper hand switching

frame_analyses.description: Preparing to cut suture ends. Scissors positioned near completed knot.
Task completed with both suture ends cut. Final knot visible on drain with no gap in slit.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clean completion with secure knot and closed drain slit

knot_assessments.notes: Proper surgeon's knot with double throw executed well
Good single throw with proper hand switch
Final throw completed with hand switch, knot appears secure

drain_assessment.assessment_note: Drain slit well approximated with no visible gap after knot tightening

technique_summary: Excellent overall performance with proper surgeon's knot technique and hand switching. Suture placement was accurate with minimal deviation from marks.
improvement_suggestions: Could improve precision of suture placement to reduce deviation penalties
Consider more efficient instrument handling to reduce overall time
strengths: Proper surgeon's knot technique with double throw
Good knot security and tension control
